user_feedback: can you fix the UI so that its on the bottom instead of the top, and I want to always have a cursor present to collect suns bits and stuff, and I also to be able to switch between cursor on grid and cursor on the plant selection, can you add all of these changes?
analysis:
- Issue identified: UI is positioned at top, cursor only visible when plant selected, no way to switch between grid and menu navigation
- Files affected: globals.js, input.js, ui.js
- Changes needed: 
  1. Add cursorMode state to track GRID vs MENU focus
  2. Move UI elements from top to bottom of screen
  3. Always render cursor (not just when plant selected)
  4. Add Tab key to switch between cursor modes
  5. Modify input handling to respect cursor mode
  6. Add visual indicators for active cursor mode
